title: What is the cleanest way to flow regulatory obligations into supplier contracts?
excerpt: We can identify obligations internally, but the hard part is translating them into supplier language without creating unmanageable audit promises.
body:
We can identify obligations internally, but the hard part is translating them into supplier language without creating unmanageable audit promises.

I am looking for practical examples of how teams distinguish between obligations that belong in purchasing terms, quality agreements, supplier onboarding, and ongoing audit programs.
author: Noah Bennett
